rows.src_en: Returns all plants from the system that the user has access to
rows.desc_en: List the plants in the store that the caller is allowed to see. This is a read-only listing; cap the result size with `limit`. Typical use is browsing or populating a catalog view.
rows.title_zh: 列出当前调用方有权查看的店内植物。这是只读列表查询,可用 `limit` 限制返回数量。典型场景为浏览或填充目录视图。

rows.src_en: The maximum number of results to return
rows.desc_en: Caps how many plants are returned in one response. Omit it to let the server apply its own default ceiling.
rows.title_zh: 限制单次响应返回的植物数量。留空则由服务端套用其默认上限。

rows.desc_en: Display name of the created plant, echoing what was stored.
rows.title_zh: 新建植物的展示名称,回显入库内容。

rows.desc_en: Free-text tag of the created plant.
rows.title_zh: 新建植物的自由文本标签。

rows.desc_en: Numeric error code identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识本次失败的数字错误码。
对错误的可读详细说明。

rows.src_en: Creates a new plant in the store
rows.desc_en: Create a new plant in the store from the supplied plant details and return the stored record. Typical use is adding inventory.
rows.title_zh: 用提交的植物信息在店内新建一条植物记录,并返回入库后的对象。典型场景为新增库存。

rows.desc_en: Display name of the created plant, echoing what was stored.
rows.title_zh: 新建植物的展示名称,回显入库内容。

rows.desc_en: Free-text tag of the created plant.
rows.title_zh: 新建植物的自由文本标签。

rows.desc_en: Caller-assigned identification number for the new plant, distinguishing it from existing records.
rows.title_zh: 为新植物指定的标识编号,用于与现有记录区分。

rows.desc_en: Display name of the created plant, echoing what was stored.
rows.title_zh: 新建植物的展示名称,回显入库内容。

rows.desc_en: Free-text tag of the created plant.
rows.title_zh: 新建植物的自由文本标签。

rows.desc_en: Numeric error code identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识本次失败的数字错误码。
对错误的可读详细说明。

rows.src_en: Deletes a single plant based on the ID supplied
rows.desc_en: Delete a single plant identified by its path `id`. On success the store returns no body. Typical use is removing inventory.
rows.title_zh: 按路径中的 `id` 删除单条植物记录。成功时不返回响应体。典型场景为下架库存。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the plant to delete. The plant with this ID is removed from the store.
rows.title_zh: 要删除的植物的标识。该 ID 对应的植物将从店内移除。

rows.desc_en: Numeric error code identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识本次失败的数字错误码。
对错误的可读详细说明。
